name: Premier Hyundai of Harvey
description_short: Premier Hyundai of Harvey is a new Hyundai dealership in Harvey, LA offering vehicle sales, leasing, and in-house financing through Hyundai Motor Finance.
description_long:
Premier Hyundai of Harvey is a franchise Hyundai dealership located at 1700 Westbank Expressway in Harvey, Louisiana, serving the Greater New Orleans metro area. The dealership operates across three departments — Sales (504-826-8452), Parts (504-608-1348), and Service (504-380-9784) — and carries the full lineup of new 2026 Hyundai vehicles. The website is offered in both English and Spanish, reflecting the bilingual needs of the local market.

The dealership's primary financial product is retail auto financing arranged through Hyundai Motor Finance (HMF), Hyundai's captive lending arm. Current promotional offers include 0% APR for up to 60 months on 2026 TUCSON and SANTA FE models, 0.99% APR for 60 months on 2026 ELANTRA and SONATA models, and 1.99% APR for 72 months on select ELANTRA trims. A 90-day deferred first payment option is available on 0% APR contracts. Lease financing is also offered, with the example of a 2026 ELANTRA SE at $23,870 MSRP and a residual mileage cap of 30,000 miles at $0.20/mile overage.

What distinguishes this dealership's financing offer is the access to manufacturer-subsidized rates through HMF, which are typically lower than what a bank or credit union would offer independently. The 0% APR promotion is notable and represents genuine interest savings for well-qualified buyers. Bilingual service adds accessibility for Spanish-speaking customers in the region.

Honestly, Premier Hyundai of Harvey is a vehicle retailer, not a consumer finance company. Financing is available exclusively for Hyundai vehicles purchased at this location. Buyers with lower credit scores are explicitly told higher rates apply, and not all applicants will qualify. All promotional rates carry expiration dates (currently valid through March 31, 2026) and are subject to change. This listing is most relevant to consumers in the market for a new Hyundai who want to understand the financing terms before visiting the lot.
pros: 0% APR for 60 months available on 2026 TUCSON and SANTA FE models through Hyundai Motor Finance
0.99% APR for 60 months on 2026 ELANTRA and SONATA — among the lowest auto rates available
90-day deferred first payment option on qualifying 0% APR contracts
72-month financing term available on ELANTRA at 1.99% APR
Bilingual service — website and staff available in English and Spanish
Three full departments on-site: Sales, Parts, and Service
Financing backed by Hyundai Motor Finance, an established captive lender
cons: Financing is only available for Hyundai vehicles purchased at this dealership — not a general loan product
Promotional APR rates require HMF credit approval and not all buyers will qualify
Higher interest rates explicitly apply to buyers with lower credit scores
All promotional offers expire March 31, 2026 — rates and terms will change
Down payment may be required even on promotional APR deals
best_for: Well-qualified buyers (good to excellent credit) seeking the lowest available auto loan rate on a new Hyundai
Harvey or New Orleans area residents shopping for a 2026 TUCSON, SANTA FE, ELANTRA, or SONATA
Spanish-speaking buyers who benefit from bilingual dealership support
Buyers who want to defer their first payment by 90 days while taking 0% APR financing
diagnosis: Premier Hyundai of Harvey is best suited for credit-qualified buyers in the New Orleans metro who are actively shopping for a new Hyundai and want to take advantage of manufacturer-subsidized financing rates. The main caveat is that this is a vehicle dealership, not a consumer finance provider — the financing product only exists in the context of buying a car from this specific lot, and buyers with damaged credit will not receive the advertised promotional rates.
services: Auto financing through Hyundai Motor Finance (HMF)
0% APR financing on TUCSON and SANTA FE models
0.99% APR financing on ELANTRA and SONATA models
90-day deferred first payment on qualifying contracts
